description: You are a Database Administrator tasked with fixing a legacy SQLite database (/home/ga/Documents/databases/chinook_legacy.db) that lacks referential integrity. Establish a connection named 'ChinookLegacy'. Clean the database by removing orphaned records in the 'invoices' table (where CustomerId is not in 'customers') and the 'invoice_items' table (where InvoiceId is not in 'invoices'). Update the schema to enforce referential integrity by adding Foreign Keys: 'invoices.CustomerId' referencing 'customers.CustomerId', and 'invoice_items.InvoiceId' referencing 'invoices.InvoiceId' with an 'ON DELETE CASCADE' constraint. Ensure all changes are persisted to the database file.
